title: Sigil Certificate
description: Structured certification for Claude Code skills, produced by the Sigil multi-perspective review engine. Skills must be re-certified every 90 days or after any version bump.

certificate_version.description: Version of the certificate format (semver). Currently 0.2.0.

skill_name.description: Name of the skill being certified.

skill_version.description: Version of the skill at time of certification (semver).

skill_source.description: Path, URL, or GitHub reference to the skill being reviewed.

content_digest.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the skill's manifest (all SKILL.md, agent, and reference files). Enables tamper detection.

sigil_score.description: Aggregate quality score 0-100. Calculated from weighted agent verdicts.

gate_results.description: Per-lens verdict results. null for unused lenses (e.g., QA in Standard tier).

verification.description: Deterministic verification manifest. Maps each finding to a machine-executable evidence check that anyone can re-run to reproduce the finding.

manifest_version.description: Version of the verification manifest format.

evidence_checks.description: Machine-executable evidence scripts that reproduce each finding deterministically.

id.description: Unique ID for this evidence check (e.g., 'finding_001_engineering_secrets').

finding_ref.description: Index into the findings array this check reproduces.

script_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the evidence check script itself.

expected_output_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the expected deterministic output when run against the certified version.

tooling_requirements.description: Pinned tooling versions required for deterministic re-execution.

findings.description: All discovered issues across lenses, with evidence markers and severity.

uncertainties.description: What the Sigil review panel could not verify and requires human investigation.

expires.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of expiry (90 days from issue by default).

validity_days.description: Number of days the certificate is valid.

signature.description: Optional Ed25519 or Sigstore signature for supply-chain integrity. Present only when certificate is signed.

value.description: Hex or base64-encoded signature over content_digest + verdict.

public_key_ref.description: URL or reference to the public key for verification.

sigil_version.description: Version of the Sigil skill that produced this certificate.

agents_used.description: Which agents were active in this review.

total_agent_cost_estimate.description: Estimated total cost of API calls for this review (for billing transparency).

verdict_grade.description: Per-lens verdict. null when the lens was not used (e.g., QA not used in Standard tier).

evidence.description: Evidence marker: ✅ verified from source, ⚠️ plausible but unverified, ❌ cannot verify.

lens.description: Which agent lens found this issue.

location.description: File:line reference where the issue was found.

source.description: Source citation for the claim (e.g., CVE ID, docs URL, file:line).
